titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean George C. Poppensiek records24-1-1646

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean George C. Poppensiek records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean

did.physdesc: Correspondence, minutes, financial and other records, date books, calendars, and other materials.
did.abstract: Includes records of George C. Poppensiek as Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes State University of New York correspondence, minutes of administrative staff, and other materials; records of the Cornell Faculty Senate; material on physical biology, 1957-1964; records of the Veterinary College Council; material on new Veterinary College buildings; budget requests and related records; date books and calendars; records of veterinarians' conferences; Association of American Veterinary Medicine Colleges material; American Veterinary Medical Association correspondence; traditional Christmas letters from the Dean to alumni, 1959-1973; and other records of George C. Poppensiek as Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Records of the Office of the Dean, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, #24-1-1646. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Veterinarians.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See Call number SF756.35.C67 C4, also other issues are available in collection #24-4-3390 and available online here: http://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/45066
